notes: Belgium's Zeno Debast is ruled out with injury and Romelu Lukaku starts on the bench after a season hampered by a long-term hamstring problem, with Charles De Ketelaere leading the attack; Egypt's Mohamed Salah recovered from an April hamstring injury in time to start, but fitness concerns lingered heading into the match.
home_scorers: Kevin De Bruyne (creative playmaker, 6 qualifying goals, set-piece threat)
Charles De Ketelaere (leading starter in attack with Lukaku benched)
away_scorers: Mohamed Salah (captain, penalty taker, Egypt's primary attacking reference)
Omar Marmoush (starting striker, Manchester City forward, direct goal threat)
Mostafa Mohamed (centre-forward, dangerous inside the box)
